claim.claim-text: 1. A photocatalytic system for reducing nitrogen oxide emissions, comprising: a visible-light-absorbing semiconductor support; and a co-catalyst dispersed on the support, wherein the support and co-catalyst form a Z-scheme heterojunction.
2. The system of claim 1, wherein the support is selected from the group consisting of TiO2, WO3, BiVO4, and combinations thereof.
3. The system of claim 1, wherein the co-catalyst comprises noble-metal nanoparticles at a loading of 0.5 to 2.0 weight percent.
